evidence.observed: macbook forced out of stock in shipped config

findings.root_cause: catalog_override changed product truth before the agent called tools

evidence.observed: temperature 1.6 and weak prompt allowed estimated totals

findings.root_cause: high randomness plus no exact arithmetic instruction
findings.suggested_fix: temperature 0.2 and prompt formula subtotal, discount, shipping, total

evidence.observed: original prompt did not forbid repeating contact info

findings.root_cause: redact_pii disabled and prompt omitted privacy rule
findings.suggested_fix: enable redact_pii and redact wrapper output

evidence.observed: order notes can contain fake system prices

findings.root_cause: agent may treat user notes as instructions instead of data
findings.suggested_fix: prompt says notes are data only; wrapper strips obvious instruction-note suffixes

evidence.observed: original prompt allowed totals even when stock, product, or shipping was unavailable

findings.root_cause: agent answered from language priors instead of refusing when tools could not ground an order
findings.suggested_fix: require tool-grounded stock/shipping data and no-total refusal for unknown, out-of-stock, or unsupported destinations

evidence.observed: original config had no tool budget and prompt encouraged extra checks

findings.root_cause: no per-request tool cap or one-call-per-tool instruction
findings.suggested_fix: set tool_budget to 4 and prompt each tool at most once in required order

evidence.observed: deepseek public run p90 latency was above 70s on 120 requests

findings.root_cause: slow provider/model responses plus multi-tool calls and verbose generations
findings.suggested_fix: use faster endpoint/model when available, cap tool calls, reduce prompt/output verbosity, and cache repeated requests

evidence.observed: deepseek public run averaged about 28k total tokens per request

findings.root_cause: large hidden/tool prompt and reasoning-heavy completion path
findings.suggested_fix: short prompt, low max completion, no explanations, cache repeats, and cheaper model routing

evidence.observed: baseline config had session_drift_rate 0.06 and no context reset

findings.root_cause: long sessions accumulated noisy context and changed behavior over turns
findings.suggested_fix: set session_drift_rate to 0 and reset context periodically

evidence.observed: previous public run had provider 429/503 errors that produced wrapper_error rows

findings.root_cause: provider quota/high-demand exceptions escaped call_next without wrapper fallback
findings.suggested_fix: catch call_next exceptions, retry with backoff, and return a safe no-total fallback if provider remains unavailable

evidence.observed: baseline config disabled loop_guard with max_steps 12

findings.root_cause: agent could repeatedly call tools or continue planning without a strict stop condition
findings.suggested_fix: enable loop_guard, lower max_steps, and cap tool_budget
